ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist is associated with */,
  "artist_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "artist_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's image */,
  "artist_social_media" TEXT /* URL to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "formed_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist or band was formed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "uri" TEXT /* URI of the song */,
  "top100" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is a top 100 song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the song on the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the song was released */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the feature belongs to */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song */,
  "key" REAL /* Key of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song */,
  "mode" REAL /* Mode of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lyrics" (
  "lyric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lyric */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the lyric belongs to */,
  "lyric_text" TEXT /* Text of the lyric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lyric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lyrics_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of user account (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "subscription_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date for premium accounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listening event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who listened to the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song that was listened to */,
  "listen_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was listened to */,
  "listen_time" TEXT /* Time of day when the song was listened to */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to listen to the song (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred genre */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred artist */,
  "preference_score" INTEGER /* User's preference score for the genre or artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "genre_id", "artist_id")
)
